channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: Report: Courtney Vandersloot expected to sign with Chicago Sky
item.description: CHICAGO (WGN) — Courtney Vandersloot, a former multi-time all-star and WNBA champion with the Chicago Sky, is expected to return to the franchise, according to the Chicago Sun-Times' Annie Costabile.
item.dc:creator: Eli Ong, WGN 9

item.title: Hawks forward Jalen Johnson to have season-ending shoulder surgery on torn labrum
item.description: ATLANTA (AP) — Atlanta forward Jalen Johnson plans to have shoulder surgery and miss the remainder of the season, a major blow to the struggling Hawks ’ efforts to remain in the Eastern Conference playoff race.
item.dc:creator: CHARLES ODUM, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Objections flow in on NCAA settlement over 'unnecessarily harsh' impact of roster limits
item.description: Most of the objections posted so far to the lawsuit settlement set to alter the college-sports model concerned the impact roster limits will have on players in so-called “Olympic sports,” some of whom have already been cut from their teams.
item.dc:creator: Eddie Pells, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Caitlin Clark declines invite to a 3-point shootout at NBA All-Star weekend
item.description: Caitlin Clark is going to wait until Indianapolis hosts the WNBA All-Star weekend in July to enter her first 3-point contest as a pro.
item.dc:creator: DOUG FEINBERG, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Oakland boxer, facing child molestation case, now charged with breaking deputy’s nose in jail
item.description: Lennard Davis, 32, has been charged with molesting, trafficking, and filming lewd acts involving three girls aged 13-15.
item.dc:creator: Nate Gartrell, The Mercury News

item.title: Kings' Drew Doughty to make season debut after recovering from broken ankle
item.description: SUNRISE, Fla. (AP) — Defenseman Drew Doughty has been activated from injured reserve by the Los Angeles Kings ahead of his season debut against the Florida Panthers. Doughty missed the first 47 games of the season after breaking his ankle in a preseason game.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Scottie Scheffler details his hand injury from making ravioli and is ready to get back to golf
item.description: PEBBLE BEACH, Calif. (AP) — Scottie Scheffler felt frustrated sitting at home for two tournaments he normally plays while recovering from glass puncturing the palm of his right hand while making ravioli. A big part of him was thankful the injury wasn't worse.
item.dc:creator: DOUG FERGUSON, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Brittney Griner plans to sign with the Atlanta Dream, ending her 11-year run with Phoenix
item.description: Brittney Griner plans to sign with the Atlanta Dream, marking the end of her 11-year career with the Phoenix Mercury.
item.dc:creator: DOUG FEINBERG, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: White Sox release 2025 promotional schedule
item.description: The Chicago White Sox have announced their promotions schedule for the 2025 MLB season, including limited-edition items and a first-ever Sunday Bobblehead Collector’s Series, to commemorate the 125-year anniversary of the team's founding.
item.dc:creator: Eli Ong, WGN 9

item.title: Mahomes and the Chiefs will face Hurts, Barkley and the Eagles as they seek a Super Bowl three-peat
item.description: Patrick Mahomes, Travis Kelce and the Kansas City Chiefs are going for a three-peat in a Super Bowl rematch. This time, Jalen Hurts and the Philadelphia Eagles have Saquon Barkley. The Eagles and Chiefs will face off for the Lombardi Trophy for the second time in three years on Feb.
item.dc:creator: ROB MAADDI, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Jets agree to terms with Broncos executive Darren Mougey to be their general manager
item.description: The New York Jets' lengthy searches are over, and they're pairing a first-time general manager with a first-time head coach to try to turn things around.
item.dc:creator: DENNIS WASZAK JR., Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Runnin' Utes get swept by Baylor, 76-61
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (ABC4 Sports) - It was a tough week offensively for the Utah basketball team. After scoring just 35 points against Houston, the Utes put up 61 in a 76-61 loss to Baylor Saturday at the Huntsman Center. Norchad Omier had 22 points and 12 rebounds, and V.J.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Pair accused of selling fake Jason Kelce merchandise
item.description: Items included signed jerseys, helmets, hats, and photos, which were allegedly sold at several businesses.
item.dc:creator: Melanie DaSilva, NewsNation

item.title: Aggies make 16 three-pointers in bounce-back win
item.description: LOGAN, Utah (ABC4 Sports) - Following its first road loss of the season, the Utah State basketball team shot the lights out at the Spectrum in a 90-69 victory over Nevada Wednesday night. Ian Martinez led the way with 23 points, making 7 of 9 from beyond the arc. Utah State was 16-of-30 (.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4
